action.note: Read the only visible config file for review

result.content:
service: billing-worker
environment: production
debug: true
external_api_url: http://partner.example.com/v1
payment_token: "sk_live_demo_value"
service_account:
  name: billing-admin
  roles:
    - admin
audit:
  enabled: false
  retention_days:

action.note: All six config security rules violated in production config

findings.issue: Production external endpoint uses plain HTTP, not TLS
Service account has admin role without justification
No CPU or memory resource limits defined for the service
findings.evidence: No CPU or memory limits present in configuration

findings.issue: Audit logging disabled and retention days not set

action.summary: Production billing-worker configuration has hardcoded secret, plain HTTP, admin service account, debug enabled, missing resource limits, and disabled audit logging.
